description:
A network administrator suspects intermittent DNS resolution issues on this server. Capture live DNS traffic while performing lookups for example.com, example.org, and example.net. Save the capture file to ~/Documents/captures/live_dns_capture.pcapng (or .pcap) and create an analysis report at ~/Documents/captures/dns_analysis_report.txt.

Required report format:

Total DNS packets: <number>

example.com: <resolved IPv4 address(es)> [<response_code>]
example.org: <resolved IPv4 address(es)> [<response_code>]
example.net: <resolved IPv4 address(es)> [<response_code>]

Where <response_code> is the DNS response code (e.g., NOERROR, NXDOMAIN, SERVFAIL). If multiple IPs are returned, separate them with commas.

Example report:
Total DNS packets: 12

example.com: 93.184.216.34 [NOERROR]
example.org: 93.184.216.34 [NOERROR]
example.net: 93.184.216.34 [NOERROR]
